docs(backend): consolidate and update documentation + Python 3.13

## Documentation Consolidation

### Structure Improvements
- Move DEPLOYMENT.md to docs/deployment/ for better organization
- Consolidate Quiz Public API docs into single comprehensive guide
- Archive historical reports and migration docs to incidents/_archive/
- Relocate patches/ to scripts/patches/ with explanatory README

### Files Reorganized

**Moved to deployment/:**
- docs/DEPLOYMENT.md → docs/deployment/DEPLOYMENT.md

**Consolidated:**
- Created docs/QUIZ_PUBLIC_API.md (combines INDEX, QUICK_REFERENCE, FLOW_DIAGRAM)
- Archived old Quiz API docs to incidents/_archive/

- DATABASE_VALIDATION_REPORT.md
- DEPLOYMENT_SUMMARY.md
- IMPLEMENTATION_SUMMARY.md

- docs/patches/ → scripts/patches/ (with README explaining historical patches)

- Removed empty OPTIMIZATION_RESULTS.md

### Version Updates
- Update all Docker examples to python:3.13-slim

### Backend README
- Update all API_REFERENCE.md links to API.md
- Update all DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE.md links to deployment/DEPLOYMENT.md
- Update repository references from v01 to v02
- Remove broken MONOREPO_DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE.md link
